inline_comments.message:
The path will be variable, per installer decision, it should go by POLICY_LOGS.   This path is not applicable to the PDP-D for example.  Nor that it makes sense to have integrity-monitor to have its own directory.

Another question is why it needs log4j, all loggers use logback.

this name is not applicable to pdp-d, nor integrity-monitor should have its own directory.   The path name is variable at installation per POLICY_LOGS.

It is unclear too why a log4j is needed.
